agentHints.purpose: An automatic-bounce tower climber that makes merchant menu photography part of the level design.
agentHints.platformRule: Every platformImages entry must be a flat food image, ideally a food close-up. The game crops them using object-fit cover into each platform.
agentHints.backgroundRule: backgroundImage is static, deliberately blurred, and covered with a light blue glass tint. Use a warm restaurant or lifestyle image, not another menu tile.
agentHints.movementRule: The player wraps through the left/right walls. Each automatic platform bounce restores one mid-air jump; Space or a tap on the playfield consumes it. Score progress is displayed as current/scoreTarget.
agentHints.chefRule: chefImage may be a transparent character illustration. When absent, the game renders a simple branded fallback character.
agentHints.cssRule: Values in css are exposed directly as CSS custom properties. The canvas reads matching colour variables from JavaScript.

content.title: MENU TOWER
content.intro: The kitchen is stacked. Steer the chef over real menu tiles and climb as high as you can.
content.winMessage: You reached the {target}-point goal and climbed {height} levels.
content.overMessage: You scored {score} points and climbed {height} levels. The next platform is always higher.
